sigWerErrors.reason: 'sefer' (this time) and 'sırada' (at this time/in this turn) are different in meaning, but in this context, both refer to the current instance. The overall meaning is only slightly changed.

'numara' (number) is replaced by 'bir' (a/one), which changes the meaning of the phrase. The sentence structure is also altered, leading to confusion about what is being referred to. This significantly affects the meaning.
